Title: __xml_ns_uname
Description: Returns an UNAME that is IRI --- concatenation of the expanded namespace IRI and the local part.
Returns an UNAME that is IRI -- concatenation of the expanded namespace IRI and the local part.
Examples:
SQL> SELECT __xml_ns_uname ('foaf', 'knows');
__xml_ns_uname
VARCHAR
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/knows
1 Rows. -- 0 msec.
